lastReleaseMessage: dashboard: writer emits standardized items-left and backlog item lists

items: Real-use testing and iterate cycles still pending (demo-seed harness now exists to unblock it: scripts/seed-demo.ps1)
Live payment integration on top of the v0.6.0 per-seat entitlement plumbing (Stripe checkout + webhooks; entitlement is computed but nothing is gated yet)

barRaise.topFinding: First full 27-lens fan-out since 2026-06-28 (the two intervening runs were carry-forward), and the verdict holds at in-progress with health 88 (was 89). No BLOCK: all five hard rules pass. Two carry-forward actions are now closed in source: the README real-use-testing section (f9a2621) and the dashboard route-count regex (b896876), lifting solo-tool-ux 82 to 90 and observability 68 to 78. The dominant theme is a release/sync gap, not a code defect. The correct docs/DESIGN.md billing doc-sync has sat uncommitted five days across six raw commits, the published dashboard JSON is stale from the 06-28 ship (api routes still 0, audit pointer stuck at 06-28 while audits ran nightly through 07-02), and the YaE-side projects/scheduler page still reads v0.4.x. A commit plus a dashboard regen clears the first two; the audit loop needs a small structural fix so it closes without a ship. The full pass also surfaced pre-existing D1 write-path efficiency items (an unbatched, partial-write generate loop, a user-list N+1, an open-shifts correlated subquery) that are hardening, not breakage. The deeper question stays deferred: a healthy 60%-complete app idling on one unresolved Nick posture call, drive to first real user via seed-demo vs re-park.

actions.title: Commit the stranded docs/DESIGN.md billing doc-sync now (git add docs/DESIGN.md then commit); stop closing drift findings as resolved-pending-commit before the commit exists.
Refresh X:\YesAndEverything\projects\scheduler\{index,design}.html to v0.6.0, adding the M7.1 (v0.5.0) and billing (v0.6.0, migration 0009) content.

Close the canonical-audit loop: make it release-aware (post-commit audit sync in release.ps1, deduped by finding-id) or have audit-scheduler-nightly update the status JSON audit pointer and findings directly.

Rewrite the schedule-generate persist path: precompute an existing-assignment Set for O(1) membership and write all new assignments plus the seed stamp in one db.batch(), fixing both the O(N-squared)/serial-round-trip cost and the partial-write risk.
Kill the user-list N+1 (1+2N queries) by replacing per-user membership loads with two batched IN-queries grouped in memory.
Fix the open-shifts list query: compute the confirmed-count once instead of a correlated COUNT(*) subquery run twice per row.
Regenerate the published dashboard JSON (run write-dashboard-status.ps1) so the corrected api-routes metric and refreshed audit pointer go live.

deferred.title: Surface the drive-to-first-user-via-seed-demo vs re-park posture decision to Nick; both completion gates dead-end on it.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: posture (drive vs park)

deferred.title: Keep the live-payment build gated behind an explicit Stripe milestone commitment so entitlement work stops accreting ahead of revenue.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: commit to Stripe milestone

deferred.title: Record an explicit DESIGN section 23 decision on whether YaS is driven to first real user or re-parked.
